statics.name: highscores
statics.description: Stores all highscore entries mapped to their scores.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initializes the save file and binds it. Also registers an auto-save on app exit.

functions.name: load
functions.description: Loads save data and deserializes highscores into the highscores map.

functions.name: flush
functions.description: Serializes highscores and writes all save data to disk.

functions.name: getSongHighscore
functions.description: Returns the highscore for a song. Returns a blank score if none exists.

functions.name: setSongHighscore
functions.description: Sets the highscore for a song. Only overwrites if the new score is higher, unless force is true.

functions.name: getWeekHighscore
functions.description: Returns the highscore for a story week.

functions.name: setWeekHighscore
functions.description: Sets the highscore for a story week. Only overwrites if the new score is higher, unless force is true.

functions.name: getSongEntry
functions.description: Constructs a HSongEntry key for use in the highscores map.

functions.name: getWeekEntry
functions.description: Constructs a HWeekEntry key for use in the highscores map.
